title: CPH2749_16.0.8.300(EX01) is available
description:
New version: CPH2749_16.0.8.300(EX01)Down to the last detail

• You can now connect your device to two sets of Bluetooth earphones simultaneously, each with its own adjustable volume, making it easy to share audio with someone else.

• The Weather app now shows moonrise, moonset, and lunar phases on its homepage, keeping you informed about the current lunar cycle.

• You can now quickly switch between apps in Outdoor mode by pinning your favorite apps to the bottom status bar for faster access.

• Game Capture now offers 2K resolution screenshots for extra detail. You can find this feature in "Game Assistant - Tools - Game Capture - 2K Hyper Resolution screenshot".

• The app drawer's Categories view now features an "App suggestions" section, which smartly highlights your most-used apps for faster access.

Security & privacy

• You can now turn off "Accessibility" permissions with a single tap. If apps installed from unofficial sources attempt risky actions, a pop-up will alert you and allow you to quickly revoke the relevant permission.

• Integrates the June 2026 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
